section.heading: Allocation of increased formula grant funds
section.chapeau: The Attorney General shall allocate an increase in the amount provided to a State under the covered formula grants under this chapter such that—

paragraph.content: 25 percent 11 So in original. Probably should be followed by “of”. the amount of the increase is provided under the program described in section 21301(1)(A) of this title; and
75 percent 1 the amount of the increase is provided under the program described in section 21301(1)(B) of this title.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 14043h–6 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
